sections.content: A generic article should remain readable without a site adapter. This case protects the ordinary Defuddle and DOM fallback path for pages that are not covered by a configured profile.
The parser should keep meaningful paragraphs, preserve important inline links, and avoid copying cookie banners or navigation text into the resulting Markdown.

rows: Build Document sections from readable content.

sections.content: Fixtures make parser changes visible before they reach real notes.
